title: Mildly Savory Spanish Fish Tapas Platter
description: A low-carb, savory Spanish dish featuring fish stock and kombu extract, served in a pandan leaf wrap. Perfect for a comforting meal on a sick day.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the cod fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a large bowl, combine fish stock, olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cod fillets to the bowl and marinate for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare the kombu extract by steeping the kombu sheets in 1 cup of cold water for 5 minutes.
Strain the kombu extract and discard the solids.
Add the kombu extract to the marinade and mix well.
Wrap each cod fillet in a pandan leaf and place on a baking sheet.
Bake the fish for 12 minutes or until cooked through.
Serve the fish tapas platter hot, garnished with lemon wedges.
